title: Exporting Filtered Dashboard to Excel
excerpt: Hi I hope all is well. Can you add the capability to export a dashboard to excel while maintaining the filters?

posts.author: JasonBrach (Jason Brach)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi I hope all is well. Can you add the capability to export a dashboard to excel while maintaining the filters?

posts.author: PMJACK (Jack)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be very useful for me to be able to export data from a dashboard table into Excel. dashboards export excel Feature requests
